initial_candidates.sql:
WITH movie_dates AS (
    SELECT 
        m.director_id,
        m.release_date,
        LAG(m.release_date) OVER (PARTITION BY m.director_id ORDER BY m.release_date) AS prev_release_date
    FROM movies m
),
inter_movie_durations AS (
    SELECT 
        director_id,
        julianday(release_date) - julianday(prev_release_date) AS inter_movie_diff
    FROM movie_dates
    WHERE prev_release_date IS NOT NULL
),
director_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        d.director_id,
        d.name,
        COUNT(m.director_id) AS movie_count,
        ROUND(AVG(imd.inter_movie_diff)) AS avg_inter_movie_duration,
        ROUND(AVG(m.rating), 2) AS avg_rating,
        SUM(m.votes) AS total_votes,
        MIN(m.rating) AS min_rating,
        MAX(m.rating) AS max_rating,
        SUM(m.duration) AS total_duration
    FROM directors d
    JOIN movies m ON d.director_id = m.director_id
    LEFT JOIN inter_movie_durations imd ON d.director_id = imd.director_id
    GROUP BY d.director_id, d.name
)
SELECT 
    director_id,
    name,
    movie_count,
    avg_inter_movie_duration,
    avg_rating,
    total_votes,
    min_rating,
    max_rating,
    total_duration
FROM director_stats
ORDER BY movie_count DESC, total_duration DESC
LIMIT 9;

WITH inter_movie_duration AS (
  SELECT 
    m.director_id,
    m.release_date,
    LAG(m.release_date) OVER (PARTITION BY m.director_id ORDER BY m.release_date) AS prev_release_date
  FROM movies m
),
movie_diffs AS (
  SELECT 
    director_id,
    julianday(release_date) - julianday(prev_release_date) AS inter_movie_diff
  FROM inter_movie_duration
  WHERE prev_release_date IS NOT NULL
),
director_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    d.director_id,
    d.name,
    COUNT(m.director_id) AS movie_count,
    ROUND(AVG(md.inter_movie_diff)) AS avg_inter_movie_duration,
    ROUND(AVG(m.rating), 2) AS avg_rating,
    SUM(m.votes) AS total_votes,
    MIN(m.rating) AS min_rating,
    MAX(m.rating) AS max_rating,
    SUM(m.duration) AS total_duration
  FROM directors d
  JOIN movies m ON d.director_id = m.director_id
  LEFT JOIN movie_diffs md ON d.director_id = md.director_id
  GROUP BY d.director_id, d.name
)
SELECT 
  director_id,
  name,
  movie_count,
  avg_inter_movie_duration,
  avg_rating,
  total_votes,
  min_rating,
  max_rating,
  total_duration
FROM director_stats
ORDER BY movie_count DESC, total_duration DESC
LIMIT 9;

WITH director_movies AS (
    SELECT 
        d.director_id,
        d.name,
        m.rating,
        m.votes,
        m.duration,
        m.release_date,
        LAG(m.release_date) OVER (PARTITION BY d.director_id ORDER BY m.release_date) AS prev_release_date
    FROM directors d
    JOIN movies m ON d.director_id = m.director_id
),
director_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        director_id,
        name,
        COUNT(*) AS movie_count,
        ROUND(AVG(
            CASE 
                WHEN prev_release_date IS NOT NULL THEN julianday(release_date) - julianday(prev_release_date)
                ELSE NULL
            END
        )) AS avg_inter_movie_duration,
        ROUND(AVG(rating), 2) AS avg_rating,
        SUM(votes) AS total_votes,
        MIN(rating) AS min_rating,
        MAX(rating) AS max_rating,
        SUM(duration) AS total_duration
    FROM director_movies
    GROUP BY director_id, name
)
SELECT 
    director_id,
    name,
    movie_count,
    avg_inter_movie_duration,
    avg_rating,
    total_votes,
    min_rating,
    max_rating,
    total_duration
FROM director_stats
ORDER BY movie_count DESC, total_duration DESC
LIMIT 9;

WITH movie_dates AS (
    SELECT 
        m.director_id,
        m.release_date,
        LAG(m.release_date) OVER (PARTITION BY m.director_id ORDER BY m.release_date) AS prev_release_date
    FROM movies m
),
inter_movie_durations AS (
    SELECT 
        director_id,
        julianday(release_date) - julianday(prev_release_date) AS inter_movie_diff
    FROM movie_dates
    WHERE prev_release_date IS NOT NULL
),
director_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        d.director_id,
        d.name,
        COUNT(m.director_id) AS movie_count,
        ROUND(AVG(imd.inter_movie_diff)) AS avg_inter_movie_duration,
        ROUND(AVG(m.rating), 2) AS avg_rating,
        SUM(m.votes) AS total_votes,
        MIN(m.rating) AS min_rating,
        MAX(m.rating) AS max_rating,
        SUM(m.duration) AS total_duration
    FROM directors d
    JOIN movies m ON d.director_id = m.director_id
    LEFT JOIN inter_movie_durations imd ON d.director_id = imd.director_id
    GROUP BY d.director_id, d.name
)
SELECT 
    director_id,
    name,
    movie_count,
    avg_inter_movie_duration,
    avg_rating,
    total_votes,
    min_rating,
    max_rating,
    total_duration
FROM director_stats
ORDER BY movie_count DESC, total_duration DESC
LIMIT 9;

WITH director_movies AS (
    SELECT 
        d.director_id,
        d.name,
        m.release_date,
        m.rating,
        m.votes,
        m.duration,
        LAG(m.release_date) OVER (PARTITION BY d.director_id ORDER BY m.release_date) AS prev_release_date
    FROM directors d
    JOIN movies m ON d.director_id = m.director_id
),
inter_movie_durations AS (
    SELECT 
        director_id,
        name,
        rating,
        votes,
        duration,
        CAST(julianday(release_date) - julianday(prev_release_date) AS INTEGER) AS inter_movie_diff
    FROM director_movies
    WHERE prev_release_date IS NOT NULL
),
director_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        d.director_id,
        d.name,
        COUNT(*) AS movie_count,
        ROUND(AVG(imd.inter_movie_diff)) AS avg_inter_movie_duration,
        ROUND(AVG(d.rating), 2) AS avg_rating,
        SUM(d.votes) AS total_votes,
        MIN(d.rating) AS min_rating,
        MAX(d.rating) AS max_rating,
        SUM(d.duration) AS total_duration
    FROM directors d
    JOIN movies m ON d.director_id = m.director_id
    LEFT JOIN inter_movie_durations imd ON d.director_id = imd.director_id
    GROUP BY d.director_id, d.name
)
SELECT 
    director_id,
    name,
    movie_count,
    avg_inter_movie_duration,
    avg_rating,
    total_votes,
    min_rating,
    max_rating,
    total_duration
FROM director_stats
ORDER BY movie_count DESC, total_duration DESC
LIMIT 9;
